dict.string: OPerationsHOS uses Contacts to let you pick people you want to track as records — vendors, contractors, family, anyone whose context belongs in your operating system.
OPerationsHOS keeps your scheduled records in sync with the system Calendar so they appear alongside your other appointments and reminders.
OPerationsHOS keeps task records in sync with the system Reminders so checking one off in either place updates both.
OPerationsHOS uses AlarmKit to schedule timer alerts that ring through Do Not Disturb so you don't miss the moment.
OPerationsHOS uses Face ID to keep your Vault — private media and secure notes — accessible only to you.
OPerationsHOS uses the camera to scan documents — receipts, business cards, paper records — into your cognitive prosthetic so they're searchable later.
